[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] '''Quannith''' was the ruler of [[Siluria III]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His mansion was attacked by a local resistance force led by [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]] and [[Corwin Shelvay/Legends|Corwin Shelvay]]. Despite having two squads of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] defending the house, the resistance fighters attack was successful. The house was destroyed, but Governor Quannith's body was never recovered from the rubble.
